nodes.label: Wiki Export
nodes.rationale: Must run before Step 9 cleanup so .graphify_labels.json is still available.

nodes.label: Neo4j Export
nodes.rationale: Uses MERGE statements so re-running never creates duplicates.

nodes.label: FalkorDB Export
nodes.rationale: Prefer --falkordb-push over the cypher.txt artifact because FalkorDB's GRAPH.QUERY runs one statement at a time with no bulk script import. The falkordb:// scheme is informational - redis:// or bare host:port also work.

nodes.label: Graphify MCP Server
nodes.rationale: Stdio MCP server exposing query_graph, get_node, get_neighbors, get_community, god_nodes, graph_stats, shortest_path so other agents can query the graph live. Claude Desktop config must use the absolute interpreter path because it cannot run $(...).

nodes.label: Token Reduction Benchmark
nodes.rationale: Only runs when total_words > 5000; for small corpora the graph's value is structural clarity, not token compression.

edges.source_location: serves the pipeline's graph.json output to other agents
